response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates strong full-stack development skills and relevant experience with AI-agent infrastructure, including Model Context Protocol (MCP) work at Naver. While his background aligns well with cloud and TypeScript/Python development, his direct experience with GenAI production systems and RAG architectures is less explicitly detailed, warranting further exploration in an interview.
strengths: Proven track record as a Staff Software Engineer with customer-facing technical leadership (e.g., Naver, Tencent).
Hands-on experience with AI-agent infrastructure and MCP code generators, aligning with key technologies for the role.
Diverse full-stack expertise in TypeScript, Python, and cloud platforms (AWS), with a focus on scalable, production-grade systems.
concerns: Limited explicit evidence of 8+ years building production-grade AI solutions (GenAI/RAG focus is implied but not detailed).
No mention of vector databases or LLM performance optimization in resume, despite their importance to the role.
Lacks advanced degrees (e.g., Master's/PhD) in AI or related fields, though this is a preferred qualification.
